{{Infobox artifact
| name = Midnight Rain
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]] is an oversized bow made from petrified wood with the blood of a [[Herald]] [[sword]] artist.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]]'s [[binding]] comes from an [[Archlord]]-level lizard.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]] can be used to draw forth a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]] is a weapon summoned by [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
